nodes.label: AI as coding assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous decision-maker in data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to assist with coding: to provide example code snippets and to discuss alternative coding solutions

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: I figured it would be much smarter and more efficient to converse with a language model

nodes.label: Researcher's critical thinking and interpretation
nodes.grounding_span: the critical thinking should be done solely by me

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: having an AI tool handle the actual scientific communication is ethically unacceptable

nodes.label: AI as future PhD-level analyst
nodes.grounding_span: if scientists are not proactive in responsible use of AI now, then no one will have the scientific literacy or experience

nodes.label: Research efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I could spend more of my time analyzing the relationship between the data rather than wrestling with it

nodes.label: Scientific understanding and discovery
nodes.grounding_span: If I rely too heavily on someone else's thoughts on my data, I run the risk of failing to properly understand it myself

nodes.label: Research integrity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: having an AI tool handle the actual scientific communication is ethically unacceptable

nodes.label: Scientific literacy and critical evaluation
nodes.grounding_span: no one will have the scientific literacy or experience to tell if an AI scientist is reasonable or accurate

nodes.label: Positive toward AI for coding tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I figured it would be much smarter and more efficient to converse with a language model

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for tasks requiring critical thinking
nodes.grounding_span: the critical thinking should be done solely by me

nodes.label: Ethical opposition to using AI for client writing
nodes.grounding_span: having an AI tool handle the actual scientific communication is ethically unacceptable

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: it would be nice if AI could perform PhD-level analysis, and I'm sure it will some day

nodes.label: Systematic iterative decomposition of tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I proposed a generic coding problem and used AI to help me develop the code to solve my proposed problem (somewhat abstracting my own work out of the process)

nodes.label: Boundary-setting and ethical deliberation
nodes.grounding_span: I think clear distinctions need to be made between using AI as a tool or resource and having AI replace all aspects of scientific research
